verified: Base Q update with extended action space (semi-MDP corrected)

subtasks_from_feature_ranking.note: subtasks_from_feature_scores() in core/options.py converts per-feature importance scores (e.g. from compute_feature_relevance) into SubtaskSpec objects. Top-K highest-scoring features become subtasks as the paper describes.

intra_option_policies.note: Linear differential Q-function per option, updated with pseudo-rewards

option_outcome_models.note: EMA cumulative reward, cumulative discount, linear next-state predictor. Updated at option termination.

planning_with_option_models.note: Semi-MDP Bellman backup implemented in _differential_semidp_q_update: Q(s,o) += alpha * (R_o - avg_r * T_o + gamma_o * V(s') - Q(s,o)). At option termination, base Q uses option duration (T_o) and cumulative discount (gamma_o) for correct differential semi-MDP update. Verified in 42 tests (2026-05-21).

utility_assessment_feedback.note: Paper describes continuous utility feedback driving dynamic option removal/creation. Not implemented as a live loop. subtasks_from_feature_scores provides the scoring function; wiring into a continuous reassessment loop is open.

continual_learning_integration.note: Average-reward formulation carried through from Step 6. IDBD/Autostep meta-learning and Horde feature construction are not wired into STOMP as a live training integration.

open_boundaries: Live auto-discovery loop: subtasks_from_feature_scores exists but not wired into a training run that continuously reassesses feature relevance and adds/removes options
Utility assessment: no feedback process removes/replaces unhelpful options/subtasks dynamically
Steps 1-3 integration: IDBD/Autostep meta-learning and Horde feature learning not wired into STOMP
Benchmark evidence on continuing tasks showing STOMP options genuinely accelerate control over flat Step 6 baseline missing
note: Step 10 now implements: (1) STOMP mechanics (options, intra-option policies, outcome models, extended action space), (2) subtasks_from_feature_scores() for feature-ranking-to-subtask auto-discovery, (3) _differential_semidp_q_update with correct semi-MDP Bellman target (R_o - avg_r*T_o + gamma_o*V(s')). 42 passing tests (2026-05-21). Remaining open: live continuous reassessment loop, utility-driven option removal, Steps 1-3 integration, and seeded benchmark showing options accelerate convergence over flat baseline.
